About

Undergraduate student at Wright State University pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology / Cybersecurity, and holder of an Associate of Applied Science in CIS and Network Engineering from Sinclair Community College — with hands-on expertise in enterprise networking, cloud security, and system administration.

  • Skilled in network architecture, cloud infrastructure, firewall deployment, and enterprise security — built through real lab environments, not just coursework
  • Deployed hybrid Azure infrastructure including FortiGate firewall, User Defined Routes, and Azure Bastion for secure, controlled traffic inspection
  • Stood up a full SIEM and monitoring stack (Wazuh + Zabbix) simulating real SOC/NOC workflows with threat detection and alerting
  • Automated Azure network deployments using Terraform and Infrastructure as Code, demonstrating modern DevSecOps practices
  • Motivated, detail-oriented, and committed to continuously sharpening skills through hands-on labs that mirror enterprise environments
  • Actively seeking internship opportunities to apply expertise in network security, cloud infrastructure, and IT engineering to real-world challenges

Projects

Azure Network Infrastructure Deployment with Terraform
Cloud / IaC
  • Designed and deployed an end-to-end Azure network using Terraform IaC including resource groups, virtual networks, and subnets — automation over manual portal config.
  • Executed full deployment workflow using Azure CLI: init, plan, apply — ensuring consistent and repeatable infrastructure provisioning.
  • Validated deployment in Azure portal while resolving configuration and syntax issues, deepening understanding of cloud resource hierarchy.
AzureTerraformIaCVirtual NetworksAzure CLIAutomation
Secure FortiGate Firewall Deployment with Azure Bastion & UDR
Cloud Security
  • Architected a secure Azure cloud network deploying a FortiGate firewall with segmented subnets and User Defined Routes to force all client traffic through firewall inspection.
  • Implemented Azure Bastion for secure remote access, eliminating public RDP exposure while enabling browser-based management of a Windows 11 VM in a private subnet.
  • Configured firewall policies, NAT, and static routing; validated end-to-end traffic flow using FortiView and log analysis.
AzureFortiGateAzure BastionUser Defined RoutesNATNetwork Segmentation
Enterprise Security & Monitoring Lab — Wazuh, Zabbix, AD, Kali
SOC / NOC
  • Built a full enterprise hybrid lab: Windows Server 2022 AD, FortiGate segmentation, and Azure hybrid connectivity via IPsec VPN and dynamic routing.
  • Deployed Wazuh SIEM for threat detection, Zabbix for performance monitoring, and GLPI for asset/helpdesk workflows — centralized SOC/NOC visibility.
  • Simulated real-world attacks with Kali Linux while enforcing identity-based access (LDAP/FSSO), validating detection, logging, and incident response.
Wazuh SIEMZabbixActive DirectoryKali LinuxLDAP/FSSOVPNGLPI
FortiGate REST API Automation with Postman
Network Automation
  • Deployed FortiGate in Azure and enabled API-based management with token authentication for secure automated access.
  • Used Postman to send HTTP GET requests and analyze JSON responses for real-time firewall configuration retrieval.
  • Built practical skills in network automation, API authentication, and programmable security interfaces.
FortiGateREST APIPostmanToken AuthJSONAutomation
OSPF Multi-Router Network with DHCP & ACLs
Cisco / Routing
  • Designed a multi-router enterprise topology in Cisco Packet Tracer with 4 routers, full IP addressing, and structured routing using OSPF.
  • Configured distributed DHCP per router and enforced access control with extended ACLs to restrict inter-host communication.
OSPFDHCPACLsCisco Packet TracerSubnetting
Enterprise LAN — VLANs, EtherChannel, HSRP, Centralized DHCP
Enterprise LAN
